_comment: Plugin-mode hooks (loaded by Claude Code plugin runtime). Uses ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT} — a plugin runtime variable that resolves to the plugin's install cache directory. For Go installer mode, use hooks/config.json instead (uses ~/.claude/hooks/ paths). SessionStart (matcher startup|resume|clear) auto-loads developer mode into context when the ~/.claude/.dev-mode-active marker is present (inert otherwise) and injects the configured default language directive from ~/.claude/.team-harness.json when a valid language key is present; UserPromptSubmit re-asserts the configured language as a terse per-turn reminder adjacent to each operator message; policy gate (PreToolUse Bash|Write|Edit|NotebookEdit) fires on every write/exec tool to secret-scan content; outward-action gate (PreToolUse Bash) gates dev-mode outward actions — separate entry from policy-block so dev-guard never fires on Edit/Write/NotebookEdit; reasoning-checkpoint guard (PreToolUse Task) gates phase dispatch; notification (Notification) fires only on idle_prompt.
